name: timeline-playhead
title: Timeline Playhead
description: A draggable timeline playhead: a vertical line with a top knob, positioned by time (currentTime × pixelsPerSecond × zoom, the same basis as timeline-ruler) and scrubbable. Drag it to seek; it scrolls with the tracks it sits over. Spans whatever container it is placed in. The playback clock and click-to-seek on the tracks are left to the consumer.
